reason_selected: AST parsing of multiple test files can be slow in Python. A pure Rust regex parser was initially considered.
what_changed: None. The refactoring attempt was reverted.
tests_run: Regex parser proved unreliable upon manual testing with Python AST comparison.
pr_url_or_blocker: PR creation blocked because implementing a pure Rust equivalent for Python AST parsing safely without dropping elements is complex and prone to edge-case bugs. A blocker report is provided in .jules/verification/rusty/rust-refactor-report.md.
known_limitations: Fallback mechanism via Python AST is maintained as a required compatibility path. See report for alternative recommendations.
